title: IT OFFICER
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION


IT Infrastructure

  • Work closely with management committee in ensuring the best IT Infrastructure in place for Muhammadiyah Association as a whole.
  • Oversee all IT functions, including network administration, system administration, hardware/software maintenance, cybersecurity, and data management.
  • Ensure adherence to data protection regulations, industry standards, and best practices.
  • Ensure efficient deployment, configuration, and maintenance of IT systems.
  • Manage user support services, ensuring timely resolution of technical issues.
  • Supervise helpdesk operations to deliver high-quality end-user service.

Project Management

  • Execute and coordinate IT-related projects ensuring timely and within-budget completion.
  • Coordinate with other departments and institutions to gather requirements, create project plans, and manage the execution of said projects.
  • Track project progress, identify risks, and recommend solutions.
  • Supervise the IT staff in executing the IT Department workplan on a quarterly basis.

Administration

  • Prepare regular monthly reports for review by General Secretary.
  • Negotiate and liaise with external IT vendors, consultants, and service providers.
  • Evaluate vendor performance to ensure compliance with contract terms.
  • Handle end-to-end procurement processes, including sourcing, evaluation, and contract management, while ensuring SOP compliance.
  • Provide basic training to end-users to optimize IT system tool usage and productivity.

Additional duties

  • Perform other tasks as assigned by CEO or Management Committee.


REQUIREMENTS

  • Degree/Diploma in IT, Computer Science or related studies with 2 to 3 or more years of working experience
  • Positive attitude with a team-player mindset with good communications and problem-solving skill
  • Team player and be independent in executing work-related jobs.

postedCompany.description:
Muhammadiyah is a non-profit Organization that runs education effort welfare development as part our obligation to the teaching of The Quran and Prophetic tradition that emphasize on excelling towards the betterment of humankind, especially in the context of Singapore. We have been heavily involved in community development efforts through the establishment of Muhammadiyah Welfare Home, Muhammadiyah Health & Daycare Centre, Muhammadiyah Islamic College, Muhammadiyah Kindergarten & Basic Islamic Religious Knowledge Centre.

Be part of us to build a meaningful career with meaningful purpose.
postedCompany.name: Muhammadiyah Association
